name: Fruity Cereal Bars
recipeInstructions:
(1) Coat an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray. Line the bottom of the pan with waxed paper cut to fit. Coat the paper with nonstick cooking spray.
(2) Put granola in a heavy-gauge plastic food bag and crush with a rolling pin or heavy pan until finely crushed.
(3) In a large, heavy nonstick skillet over medium heat, stir marshmallows, preserves, butter, and sugar until marshmallows melt and the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat. Stir in granola and dried fruit until well coated.
(4) Scrape into the prepared pan and cover with waxed paper. Place another 8-inch square pan or a heavy book on top.
Press to compact the mixture into an even, firm layer.
(5) Chill until firm, about 1-1/2 hours. Invert onto a cutting board and remove waxed paper. Cut into bars or diamonds. Store loosely covered at room temperature up to 1 week.
